name: 2.38 acre property in Klamath, OR for $250/mo (APN 6410)

description.value: This 2.38-acre property in Klamath County, Oregon, presents an exceptional opportunity for agricultural investors and hobby farmers seeking affordable land with minimal tax burden, as evidenced by the remarkably low annual taxes of just $63.10, making it an ideal cost-effective investment for those looking to establish or expand their farming operations in a region known for its agricultural heritage and fertile growing conditions.

time_limit_to_build: 6 months once permit is issued; can be extended.
manufactured_allowed: Yes, if home site is approved. Must be newer than June 15, 1976.
tiny_home_friendly: Per county ordinance, must submit a plan for county review to confirm.
full_time_rv: No, limited to 21 days in each 6-month period.
rv_while_build: Yes, up to 21 days in each 6-month period.
camping_rv: Yes, up to 21 days in each 6-month period.
tent_camping: Yes, up to 21 days in each 6-month period.
well: Yes, or use KFFE community well ($150 fee).
electricity: No. Power poles visible nearby to the east at developed property. Would need to run lines or use alternative/solar power.
gas: No natural gas. Propane available via Klamath Falls Propane Station (541) 414-6657 or Propane Exchange at The Home Depot (541) 884-0075.
